description: Goal: stress protocol dispatch and callable reducers in the semantic fixpoint. Change: derive list receiver protocol selection, Enumerable.List.reduce activation, reducer bridge callable entry, user lambda activation, Kernel.+ edge, and public return contract. Check: Enum.reduce settles to int without any fallback and excludes map/range/unrelated Enum functions.
title: Compiler2 semantic: prove Enum.reduce protocol and callable facts
